title: Claires shuts 154 UK stores overnight as 1300 jobs lost in major high street collapse
summary_full: Claire's has abruptly closed all 154 of its UK and Ireland standalone stores, resulting in over 1,300 job losses. The teen jewellery giant's decades-long high street presence collapsed due to a combination of online shopping shifts, rising costs, and financial struggles.
